title: BEM-866 inspect codex queue block
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
lines = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if p.exists() else []
idxs = [i for i,l in enumerate(lines) if 'Process workflow dispatch queue' in l or 'process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py' in l or 'GH_TOKEN:' in l]
out = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CODEX_QUEUE_BLOCK.md')
out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
blocks = []
for idx in idxs:
    start = max(0, idx-8)
    end = min(len(lines), idx+12)
    block = []
    for n in range(start, end):
        block.append(str(n+1) + ': ' + lines[n])
    blocks.append('\n'.join(block))
out.write_text('# BEM-866 codex queue block\nIndexes: ' + str(idxs) + '\n\n' + '\n\n---\n\n'.join(blocks) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(out))
ops_applied.append('inspected codex queue block')
"""
No issue comments.
